bead.title: Stage 1.5: supersede ADR-005-local-first-beads-ui.md
bead.description: Mark docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-005-local-first-beads-ui.md as Superseded. Change status to 'Superseded by ADR-002 v2 (2026-04-14)'. Replace the body with a single paragraph explaining that client-side minisearch was a workaround for missing pagination; Relay cursor connections solve this at the schema level. File stays (historical record). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #5.
bead.acceptance: (1) ADR-005 status field is 'Superseded'. (2) Body is one paragraph pointing at ADR-002 v2. (3) File still exists (not deleted).
